sections.description: A complete restaurant menu management system with multiple menus, categories, featured items, dietary badges, photo support, shortcodes, and Google Schema.org structured data.
sections.changelog:
1.5.2

  • Added [rmm_info] shortcode — output name, phone, address, or cuisine from Settings anywhere on the site. Phone is a tappable link on mobile only.

1.5.1

  • Fixed plugin slug and GitHub Pages URL for correct update detection

1.5.0

  • Added layout shortcode attribute, [rmm_featured_item] shortcode, typography controls

1.4.0

  • Added Menus column and Filter by Menu dropdown

1.3.0

  • Added full Quick Edit support

1.2.0

  • Enforced Classic Editor

1.0.0

  • Initial release
